title: eleganttime Potion Bottles with Cork,12 Pack Small Clear Vintage Decorative Bottles,Mini Vase Glass Jars With Cork Lids for DIY Crafts,Decor,Sand Art
description:
About this item
What You Will Get: 12 Pcs Glass Bottles with cork.Measures approximately 4.5" tall x 1.4" wide, bottle opening on top measures 0.45"(11.4mm)
Unique Design: Each bottle is decorated with different texture patterns.Classic timeless patterns make them elegant and beautiful.They will be a nice choice for your DIY crafts,decor or sand art
Multi-Use: Ideal for all sorts of cosplay,sand holder, message bottles, wedding favors, table decor, tree bottles, decorative wine bottles, shot bottles, liquor bottles
Thick Glass: Made with premium glass and shaped by hand, each glass bottle has a unique design, and allows heavy resistance to long term use
Beautiful Jars: You will love the clear decorative bottles.Have it for your own or send as a surprise on Mother's Day,Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, Weddings or Housewarmings
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
These bottles so pretty. They are great quality and are good for Halloween crafts and decor.Perfect size for crafts (Angel). They will not over power a window ledge. They set comfortably with other crafted items on the shelf.I originally bought these to bottle "potion" bottles to gift during seasonal festivals like the Renaissance Fair. It turned out that these were perfect for the job ^^This collection of glass bottles is cool. They are all different and of some intriguing design. My daughter has been making for herself and now many friends and their friends and such potions. And the demand for these potions keeps growing. Now these potions are merely water, some coloring, and some luster materials. She caps them and seals them with wax. And lots of people want them. She had been using plain small bottles from the local hobby place. When I found these I knew I had to get them. They were a big hit with her and obviously her customers because the demand has went up. These. Bottles all have their own unique design, and make her crafts look more mysterious. She loves them!I love little potion bottles, especially this set. I love the funky shapes and designs these have and I can't wait to use them for Halloween and make labels for them. I am currently using one to keep (naturally shed) pet whiskers in and they look great!If you're searching for a way to add a touch of vintage elegance to your home decor, the Eleganttime Potion Bottles with Cork are a must-have! This pack of 12 small, clear bottles are perfect for DIY crafts, sand art, and more. The cork lids add a charming touch and make these bottles perfect for use as mini vases. Overall, these bottles are a great purchase and I highly recommend them for anyone looking to add a unique touch to their home decor.I love the variety of these bottles. The glass is thick and each one is different. I work at a Hoodoo shop and sometimes we have story hours and craft hours for the local children. I'm going to use these for a class on making potions for things like Bravery, Studying, and Kindness. (No eye of newt... just cucumber water and the like.) These will be great for that because they're surprisingly sturdy. I love them and the price is right!I absolutely loved the details of these bottles and the variety. I use mine as potion and/or accent bottles for crafting and they are perfect for that. Yes, they ARE small as described and in the description and photos you will see the measurements 4.5" tall x 1.4" wide and 5.08"W x 5.8"H. The 3rd photo shows the exact size of EACH bottle. They would be perfect for sand projects or as potion bottles, small vases, part of a center piece and much more!! You get exactly what is shown. The bottles are very good quality and design. Very good value for the money!!These are really cute bottles. I could not resist getting them when I saw them and I am glad I did. Each has its own unique shape/design. I am not sure what I am going to do with them as I do not make potions but I will think of something.

I recommend these to anyone for any reason. Have fun.My latest hobby is herb growing and making medicines and teas with the herbs. These bottles will be great for the tinctures and medicines that I will be making.

I can't wait until summer when I start harvesting the herb and making items that can go in these bottles.

They are so cute.
reviews_1s: Bottles came dirty inside, leftover label residue and paper and missing 4 out of 12 corks. Definitely not worth $46
